---
title: ""
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    classoption: [landscape, a4paper]
    geometry:
      - margin=0.4in
      - top=0.35in
      - bottom=0.35in
    fontsize: 8pt
    colorlinks: true
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{multicol}
        \usepackage{titlesec}
        \usepackage{xcolor}
        \definecolor{heraldblue}{HTML}{1f4e79}
        \titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{4pt}{1pt}
        \titlespacing*{\subsection}{0pt}{3pt}{0pt}
        \titleformat{\section}{\normalsize\bfseries\color{heraldblue}}{}{0pt}{}
        \titleformat{\subsection}{\small\bfseries\color{heraldblue}}{}{0pt}{}
        \setlength{\columnsep}{1.2em}
        \setlength{\parskip}{1pt}
        \setlength{\parindent}{0pt}
        \pagenumbering{gobble}
    include-before-body:
      text: |
        \begin{center}
          {\Large\bfseries\color{heraldblue} herald cheatsheet}\quad
          {\small Pure-R CDISC conformance validation \textbar\ layers L0-L6 mirror \texttt{?herald}}
        \end{center}
        \vspace{-6pt}
        \hrule
        \vspace{4pt}
        \begin{multicols}{3}
    include-after-body:
      text: |
        \end{multicols}
keep-tex: false
execute:
  eval: false
  echo: true
---

\section*{L0 -- Read}

Pure-R XPT v5, Dataset-JSON v1.1, Parquet, Define-XML 2.1.
No Java or SAS dependency.

```r
library(herald)

dm   <- read_xpt("dm.xpt")
ae   <- read_json("ae.json")
adsl <- read_parquet("adsl.parquet")
def  <- read_define_xml("define.xml")
```

\section*{L1 -- Spec}

Build a `herald_spec` from Define-XML, JSON, or
list input. Carries dataset and variable metadata.

```r
spec <- as_herald_spec(def)

spec <- herald_spec(
  datasets  = list(...),
  variables = list(...)
)

is_herald_spec(spec)
```

\section*{L2 -- Stamp}

Stamp spec attributes (labels, lengths, types,
classes) onto data frames pre-validation.

```r
dm <- apply_spec(dm, spec)
ae <- apply_spec(ae, spec)
```

\section*{L3 -- Dict}

Register controlled terminology and external
dictionaries via the provider protocol.

```r
ct <- ct_provider(load_ct("sdtm", "2024-09-27"))
mh <- meddra_provider(path = "meddra/")

register_dictionary("CT",     ct)
register_dictionary("MEDDRA", mh)

list_dictionaries()
```

\section*{L4 -- Catalog}

Inspect the compiled rule corpus: SDTM-IG,
ADaM-IG, Define-XML, CDISC Library CORE.

```r
cat <- rule_catalog()
supported_standards()

sdtm <- cat[cat$standard == "SDTM-IG", ]
```

Rule ID prefixes:

```
ADaM-N          ADaM-IG v5.0
SDTMIG-CGNNNN   SDTM-IG v2.0
DEFINE-NNN      Define-XML v2.1
CORE-NNNNNN     SDTM Library API
```

\section*{L5 -- Validate}

Run the rule catalog against a directory or
named list. Returns a `herald_result`.

```r
res <- validate(
  files = list(DM = dm, AE = ae),
  spec  = spec,
  rules = c("SDTMIG-CG0001", "CORE-000123")
)

summary(res)
```

Severity and scope filters:

```r
res <- validate(
  files        = "data/",
  severity_map = c("SDTMIG-CG0042" = "warning"),
  standards    = "SDTM-IG"
)
```

\section*{L6 -- Report}

Render reviewer-ready artifacts: self-contained
HTML, workbook XLSX, machine JSON.

```r
write_report_html(res, "report.html")
write_report_xlsx(res, "report.xlsx")
write_report_json(res, "report.json")

# extension dispatch
report(res, "out/report.html")
```

\columnbreak

\section*{Quick reference}

\subsection*{Layer stack}

```
6  Report     write_report_html / xlsx / json
5  Validate   validate(files = ..., rules = ...)
4  Catalog    rule_catalog / supported_standards
3  Dict       ct_provider / register_dictionary
2  Stamp      apply_spec
1  Spec       as_herald_spec / herald_spec
0  Read       read_xpt / read_json / read_define_xml
```

\subsection*{End-to-end}

```r
res <- validate(
  files = list(DM = dm, AE = ae),
  spec  = as_herald_spec(def)
)
write_report_html(res, "qc.html")
```

\subsection*{Status}

Pre-CRAN. Lifecycle: experimental.
Project: \texttt{vthanik/herald}. License: MIT.
